hero_section.title_line1: Custom Software Development for Your Vision.
hero_section.description: As a freelancer, I build websites and mobile apps that align with your requirements and suit your business.

service_section.title: How I Can Help
service_section.description: Good development starts before the first line of code. With my tech stack, I build digital products with thoughtful concepts, clean architecture, and maintainable code that stands the test of time.

services.title: Development as an Extension of Your Team
services.description: An ongoing project and need for support? After a brief handover, I jump in, work independently, and deliver a clean pull request on time.

services.title: Design to Code
services.description: Have a finished design or Figma file? I translate it into a fast, responsive website or mobile app with precision.

services.title: Custom Software Development from Scratch
services.description: No digital product yet, but a clear vision? I build websites and mobile apps from design and development to go-live. With clean architecture, maintainable and extendable code, and a user experience that feels natural.

services.title: Feature Development & Integration
services.description: New features for an existing codebase? I integrate into ongoing projects and deliver production-ready features — from forms, APIs, and authentication to dashboards, payment systems, and interactive animations.

services.title: Website and App Redesign
services.description: An outdated website or app costs more than it brings in. I revamp existing projects into individual, stylish designs that reflect your brand.

project_phases_section.title: From Idea to Launch
project_phases_section.description: Every project follows a clear structure — from the first inquiry to go-live. Transparent communication, defined milestones, and clean handoffs are not extras, they are standard.

phases.name: Inquiry
phases.description: Every great project starts with a no-obligation initial conversation.
details: You reach out with your idea or a short project brief
We discuss goals, scope, and budget — by call, video, or in person
You get honest feedback and a clear assessment of the scope
You receive a tailored proposal

phases.name: Concept
phases.description: Structure before style. A solid concept lays the foundation — from the first wireframe to the final line of code.
details: Information architecture and user flows are mapped out
Wireframes and rough layout concepts are sketched, if no design exists yet
Technical architecture and stack decisions are finalized
You receive a clear project roadmap with a realistic timeline

phases.name: Design
phases.description: Your vision takes visual shape. Every screen and component is crafted with purpose and your brand in mind.
details: High-fidelity mockups are created in Figma
You review and provide feedback in defined rounds
Responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Final design is approved before development begins

phases.name: Development
phases.description: Clean code meets pixel-perfect execution. Built with performance, maintainability, and scalability at its core.
details: Component-based development with modern frameworks (Next.js, React, Flutter)
Regular progress updates and demo previews keep you in the loop
Cross-browser and cross-device testing throughout the build
Code is documented, structured, and ready for handoff

phases.name: Launch
phases.description: Your product is ready for the world. A smooth, structured go-live — with everything properly in place.
details: Final quality assurance and bug fixing before launch
Deployment (Vercel, Cloudflare, or your own server)
Domain setup, SSL, and performance optimization
Post-launch support to make sure everything runs smoothly

portfolio_section.title: Selected Work
portfolio_section.description: A selection of digital projects — from independently conceived and built websites to apps with hundreds of thousands of users, developed as part of an agency team.

projects.title: Institut for Electrochemistry, Galvanic and Materialchemistry
projects.description: A state-authorized civil engineering institute specializing in chemistry, corrosion, and surface engineering. The project covered concept, design, and full implementation — front-end development through to deployment — with a focus on a structured, professional presentation that reflects the institute's technical expertise.

projects.title: Camp Currie
projects.description: A website for a non-profit agricultural initiative. Full project from concept and design to deployment — with a focus on a welcoming, clearly structured design that communicates the project's values.

projects.title: Pictolog PDF
projects.description: An independently conceived, designed, and developed offline app for project management and report creation. All data is stored locally on-device. Users can document progress visually and in writing, and export reports directly as PDFs.

projects.title: Aktionsfinder App and PWA
projects.description: Austria's leading platform for leaflets, promotions, and offers. As part of the development team at Marqably, I contributed continuously to the app and PWA — bug fixes, feature implementations, and design updates in a live, scaled codebase.

projects.title: Tiroler Tageszeitung App
projects.description: A news app with hundreds of thousands of active users. Ongoing development as part of the team at Marqably — bug fixes, feature enhancements, Dark Mode implementation, and continuous design updates.

about_me_section.title: Hello World
about_me_section.name: Lena Zyadeh, BSc.
about_me_section.description:
I am a freelance web and app developer specializing in React, Next.js, and Flutter.

I started my career at Marqably, a digital agency in Vienna, where I spent two years building and maintaining several digital products — including apps with hundreds of thousands of active users. That experience shaped the standards I hold my work to: clean code, proper documentation, and a working style that doesn't need hand-holding.

Now working independently, I take on projects where both sides matter — a strong sense for design, and the technical depth to execute it properly.

contact_section.title: Let's work together.
contact_section.description: Have a project, an idea, or just a question? I'd love to hear from you — for a free initial conversation, online or over a coffee in Vienna.

packages.name: Starter
packages.for: For: Solo entrepreneurs, small service providers
features: Landing page or up to 5 pages

packages.name: Business
packages.for: For: Established businesses, regulated professions (doctors, lawyers, restaurants etc.)
